calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: M. Kingsley Brown for Diana Percoraro.

The Court inquired as to why the extraordinary fees should be allowed. Mr. Brown stated that there was a double entry on page eight and that even though the entry was restated it did not change the numbers. Mr. Brown presented his argument in support of the extraordinary fees stating that this was the most difficult case he has worked on in twenty years, that he had worked with the purchaser to have work done on the property, that on the night before the deal was to close that the buyers wanted to back out, and that after a five hour phone call the deal finally closed. The Court took the matter under submission noting that counsel may not get all the fees that were requested.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (911-913 Cap St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Oct-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: M. Kingsley Brown for Diana Pecoraro (Petitioner).

There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $548,135.00 (an order for the same was signed in open court). No additional bond was required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
